what_changed.text: Autonomous vehicle providers are increasingly focusing on enhancing rider experience and public engagement, signaling a shift from pure technical development to consumer-centric services.

strategic_signal.signal: Autonomous vehicle services shifting towards consumer-centric experience
strategic_signal.description: Autonomous vehicle providers are moving beyond technical development to enhance rider experience and public engagement, indicating maturation of the market towards consumer adoption and service differentiation.
strategic_signal.watch_next_week: Monitor announcements on new consumer experience features and marketing campaigns from autonomous vehicle providers.

why_it_matters.text: This shift indicates market maturation and opens new opportunities for differentiation and adoption, impacting investment priorities and competitive positioning in autonomous mobility.
